finding_results.notes: Anika submits truthful pain data, but Ravi immediately escalates with ongoing opposition (case-review email and provider-reassignment request), preserving unresolved forward pressure.
Ravi's coercion now yields explicit immediate fallout: he imposes monitoring/control conditions and sustains procedural retaliation, while closing tone remains tense rather than triumphant.
The confrontation now contains a concrete threat mechanism: Ravi explicitly conditions consent, threatens immediate withdrawal, and states complaint escalation.
Policy delivery is redistributed with embodied interruption (stance, jaw tension, deadline tracking, reaction dialogue), reducing procedural block density in the back-half escalation.
Adult compliance role is renamed to Nadia Serrano throughout chapter 10, disambiguating identity from the chapter-8 junior opponent name collision.

summary: Implemented targeted structural/craft revisions in chapter 10: concretized threat language, broke up procedural exposition with reaction beats, intensified unresolved coercion fallout at close, and resolved the cross-chapter name collision by renaming the compliance coordinator.
